title: SessionSummary
description: Broker list-facing summary model for interactive sessions.

updated_at.description: Latest session update time visible to broker reads.

status.description: Session lifecycle status in closed vocabulary.

last_activity_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent observed session activity.

last_activity_kind.description: Most recent activity kind in stable broker-facing vocabulary.

last_activity_preview.description: Optional concise preview for list rendering; non-authoritative and human-facing.

turn_count.description: Ordered transcript turn count currently known for this session.

linked_run_count.description: Number of linked runs associated with the session timeline.

linked_approval_count.description: Number of linked approvals associated with the session timeline.

linked_artifact_count.description: Number of linked artifacts associated with the session timeline.

linked_audit_event_count.description: Number of linked audit events associated with the session timeline.

has_incomplete_turn.description: Whether the latest turn is still in-progress or awaiting terminal completion.
